LSE-MS6-L4-1400P-MSELA6-ARA-API-01 • MS ELA Grade 6 • Theme and How It Is Conveyed Through Details

The Paddle Remembers

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION: Why does the boy say the paddle "kind of remembers" the grandma?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about why the boy says the paddle "kind of remembers" the grandma, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from what he says about the paddle and about the grandma's actions, and articulate the conclusion that follows about what the paddle carries.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CCSS RL.6.2  |  MS ELA Grade 6: Theme Conveyed Through Details
